Close to 100 apple trees spread out throughout this field. Apples are not that healthy, indicating a lack of nutrients, and definitely some pest problems; They do make a killer cider/applesauce however. Many locals and MTU students know this field and deer eat
Park at Nara Nature Chalet and follow dirt trail down the hill. There are trail maps to help guide you.
